title.v: khai báo thông tin theo đơn vị cơ sở

items.key: @@admin = 1 or ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_access = 1) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_access = 1)

header.e: <div id="hidden_label">Calculate Cost of Product Group by</>

footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: if not exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_dtgt_dvcs' and val = '1') begin select 'var f = this;setObjectFormHidden(f, [''x_dt_lsx'', ''x_dt_bp'', ''x_dt_sp'', ''hidden_line'', ''hidden_line2'', ''hidden_label'']);' as message return end

&CheckTaxCodeDeclare; declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đơn vị %s đã có trong danh sách khai báo thông tin theo đơn vị cơ sở.' else N'The unit %s already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

&CommandCheckTaxCodeBeforeSave;
if exists(select 1 from @@table where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

declare @info nvarchar(4000) select @info = 'Structure/App/Entity.txt' + char(255) + replace(@ma_dvcs, ',', char(253)) &CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarningMessage;, 'KK.Update.CreateFile(' + @info + ')' as invoke else select '' as message, 'KK.Update.CreateFile(' + @info + ')' as invoke return

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs declare @info nvarchar(4000) select @info = 'Structure/App/Entity.txt' + char(255) + replace(@ma_dvcs, ',', char(253)) &CommandListCheckTaxCodeWarningMessage;, 'KK.Update.CreateFile(' + @info + ')' as invoke else select '' as message, 'KK.Update.CreateFile(' + @info + ')' as invoke return
declare @info nvarchar(4000) select @info = 'Structure/App/Entity.txt' + char(255) + replace(@ma_dvcs, ',', char(253)) select '' as message, 'KK.Update.CreateFile(' + @info + ')' as invoke return
